# Generated evidence

## Why this folder exists

Outputs from tests, audits, scripts — not source code. Safe to regenerate.

## What is here

- audits/ — security, lighthouse, merge checklists
- screenshots/ — Playwright captures
- coverage/, docs-rendered/, project-tree.csv, repo-dir-tree.xlsx
- tooling-docs/, tooling-reports/ — legacy tools/ outputs

## Rules

- Do not hand-edit as source of truth
- Commit selectively for handover evidence

---
*Generated by `scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `npm run docs:sync:all`.*
